title: Ranger Finance
summary: Ranger Finance is a Solana perpetuals aggregator focused on unified liquidity, smart routing, and trading analytics. Arcium includes it in the encrypted DeFi ecosystem, but the public Ranger materials I reviewed do not document a specific Arcium integration.
description:
Ranger Finance calls itself the first Solana perps aggregator and highlights aggregated liquidity, smart order routing, and comprehensive data insights. That makes it directly relevant to Atlas because confidential order flow and protected execution become especially meaningful where perps routing and liquidation-sensitive activity are involved.

Arcium includes Ranger Finance in the encrypted DeFi ecosystem. That is enough for Atlas inclusion, but not enough to classify the project as a confirmed Arcium integration from current public materials.

bodySections.title: Trading_Surface
bodySections.body: Ranger's public pitch centers on one-tap access to aggregated liquidity, routing, and analytics across Solana perps venues. This is exactly the kind of surface where Atlas readers should expect confidential execution to matter if it is ever shipped.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium lists Ranger Finance among DeFi ecosystem partners. That supports inclusion as ecosystem coverage, but I did not find a currently documented Ranger feature explicitly built on Arcium.

statusNote: Arcium includes Ranger Finance in its DeFi ecosystem coverage, but the currently public Ranger materials do not document an explicit Arcium-powered feature.

sources.label: Ranger Finance Website
sources.note: Official site describing Ranger Finance as the first Solana perps aggregator.

sources.label: Arcium Encrypted Ecosystem
sources.note: Arcium lists Ranger Finance among DeFi ecosystem partners.
